name: Demo Seed Data for Magic Link Test Users
description: Pre-fill magic link test accounts with realistic seeded data — companies, contacts, deals, meetings with transcripts, intelligence, scorecards, classifications — creating a fully simulated demo where real AI features work against seeded data and consume real credits.

stories.title: Write realistic transcript templates for 6 sales call scenarios
acceptance: 6 transcript templates: discovery, demo, negotiation, follow-up, closing, general check-in
Each transcript is 80-150 lines of realistic sales dialogue
Transcripts include placeholder tokens for company/contact name injection
Transcripts contain varied signals: objections, buying signals, pricing discussions, competitor mentions
Format matches existing transcript_text field (plain text, speaker labels)

stories.title: Build seed-demo-data edge function — companies, contacts, stages
acceptance: New edge function supabase/functions/seed-demo-data/index.ts created
Seeds 8-10 companies with realistic names, domains, industries, sizes
Seeds 30+ contacts across those companies with names, titles, emails, engagement levels
Seeds 5 default pipeline stages (Lead, Qualified, Proposal, Negotiation, Closed Won)
Uses service role client, getCorsHeaders pattern, pinned supabase-js@2.43.4
Accepts { org_id, user_id } as input params

stories.title: Add meeting seeding with transcripts, attendees, contacts
acceptance: Seeds 15-20 meetings spread across 3 months with realistic date distribution
Each meeting linked to a company/contact via meeting_contacts (is_primary=true)
transcript_text populated from templates with company/contact names injected
meeting_attendees created for each meeting (rep + 1-3 external attendees)
All processing statuses set to 'complete' (transcript_status, summary_status, etc.)
meeting_type set appropriately (discovery, demo, negotiation, etc.)

stories.title: Add meeting intelligence seeding — classifications, scorecards, summaries, action items
acceptance: Each meeting gets a meeting_classifications row with realistic boolean signals, topics, objections, stage detection
Each meeting gets a meeting_scorecards row with overall_score, grade, metric_scores, strengths, coaching_tips
Each meeting gets a meeting_structured_summaries row with key_decisions, commitments, stakeholders, outcome_signals
Key meetings get 2-4 action items each with realistic titles, assignees, priorities, deadlines

stories.title: Add deals and deal notes seeding
acceptance: Seeds 10-12 deals across pipeline stages with realistic values ($5K-$150K)
Deals linked to seeded companies and primary contacts
Mix of active, won, and at-risk deals with appropriate health_scores and risk_levels
2-3 deals have deal notes with context

stories.title: Add activities, tasks, and org context seeding
acceptance: Seeds 20-30 activities (mix of meetings, outbound emails, proposals) over 3 months
Seeds 5-8 pending tasks with realistic titles and due dates
Seeds organization_enrichment with completed status and realistic company data
Seeds organization_context with industry insights and ICP data

stories.title: Wire seed-demo-data into complete-test-user-signup as async call
acceptance: complete-test-user-signup calls seed-demo-data async after step 7 (fire-and-forget)
Only triggers seeding when tokenData.is_test_user is true
seed-demo-data registered in supabase/config.toml with verify_jwt = false
Seeding failure does not block signup response

stories.title: Deploy seed-demo-data to staging and test end-to-end
acceptance: seed-demo-data deployed to staging with --no-verify-jwt
complete-test-user-signup redeployed to staging
New magic link generates account with full seeded data
Dashboard shows meetings, deals, contacts after signup
Ask Anything search works against seeded transcript data
Aggregate analytics (heatmap, team comparison) show data from seeded classifications

parallelGroups.reason: Different tables, all depend only on SEED-002/003
